message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
title Sequence Diagram for ListingController and FixPriceListingMapper

participant "ListingController" as LC
participant "FixPriceListingMapper" as FPLM
participant "Database" as DB
participant "allListings: ArrayList<FixPriceListing>" as AL

activate LC
LC ->> LC: doGet()
activate LC
LC ->> FPLM: readList()
activate FPLM
FPLM ->> DB: SELECT * FROM fixed_price_listing
activate DB
DB --> FPLM: resultSet
deactivate DB
FPLM ..> AL: create(title=resultSet.getString("title"), ...)
FPLM --> LC: allListings
deactivate FPLM
deactivate LC

@enduml
```
